summary:
Software engineer with 10+ years of experience building and scaling payment platforms across fintech and e-commerce. Currently leading a team of 6 engineers responsible for the core payments API — processing millions of transactions per day across Europe and Latin America.

Strong background in distributed systems and event-driven architecture. Comfortable switching between technical leadership and hands-on delivery — contributing code, reviewing architecture, and working closely with product and compliance teams.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer → Engineering Lead, Payments
highlights: Led migration of the monolithic payments service to an event-driven microservices architecture (Kafka + Go) — reduced p99 latency by 40% and enabled independent scaling per payment method
Built the fraud detection pipeline integrating three third-party risk providers with a local rules engine — reduced chargebacks by 22% in the first quarter after launch
Grew the team from 2 to 6 engineers; introduced engineering ladders, quarterly tech reviews, and a rotating on-call structure
Led PCI-DSS Level 1 compliance project: scoped the cardholder data environment, coordinated penetration testing, and managed remediation across 4 teams
Designed and shipped the multi-currency settlement module supporting 12 currencies and 3 payout schedules — unblocked expansion into 5 new markets

experience.title: Software Engineer, Checkout
highlights: Owned the checkout API serving 2M+ daily active users across web and mobile; maintained 99.95% uptime through two Black Friday peaks
Rebuilt the discount and promotions engine from scratch — cut promotion setup time from 3 days to under 2 hours for the business team
Introduced contract testing between checkout and inventory services, eliminating a class of production incidents caused by silent API changes
Mentored 2 junior engineers; both were promoted within 18 months

experience.title: Junior → Mid Software Engineer
highlights: Delivered full-stack features across 6 client projects (retail, logistics, healthcare) as a consultant in a small agency
Built a real-time warehouse dashboard using WebSockets — replaced a manual refresh flow that had been in place for 5 years
Introduced automated testing to the agency's default project template, raising average coverage from 0% to 65%

education.notes: Specialisation in distributed systems and networks. Final project: a peer-to-peer file-sharing protocol with Byzantine fault tolerance.

awards.name: Hack to the Future — 1st place
awards.description: Won the company-wide hackathon with a prototype for real-time spend analytics using streaming aggregations over the payments event log. The prototype was productionised and shipped 6 months later.

side_projects.name: pago-cli
side_projects.description: Command-line tool for reconciling personal bank exports (CSV/OFX) against a local ledger. Built for privacy — runs entirely offline, no cloud sync.

side_projects.name: kafka-lag-exporter
side_projects.description: Prometheus exporter for Kafka consumer group lag with per-partition granularity. Used in production at FinCo before an equivalent was added to the official ecosystem.

side_projects.name: homelab
side_projects.description: Self-hosted infrastructure running on a mini-PC cluster: Proxmox, TrueNAS, Home Assistant, and a local Ollama instance for experimenting with LLM integrations without cloud dependencies.
